---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for CapOwn
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe the user problem or workflow gap.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior or API you want.

## Target User

Who needs this? For example: individual developer, team operator, hosted user,
self-hosted user, enterprise administrator, or Agent integration author.

## Security and Trust Impact

Describe whether this changes authentication, authorization, stored data,
remote execution, workspace boundaries, or hosted-service trust assumptions.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any workaround or alternative design you considered.
